title: Flutter Debug Configuration
description: Configuration for debugging Flutter applications and tests using the official Flutter SDK debug adapter

label.description: Human-readable label for this debug configuration

request.description: Whether to launch a new process or attach to an existing one

program.description: Path to the Dart entrypoint file (relative to cwd)

cwd.description: Working directory for the debug session

args.description: Additional arguments passed to Flutter run

env.description: Environment variables for the debug session

vmServiceUri.description: VM service URI for attach mode

testMode.description: Run using the test debug adapter (flutter debug-adapter --test)

flutterSdkPath.description: Optional explicit path to the Flutter SDK binary

stopOnEntry.description: Pause execution at the program entry point
